channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: MemeHouse Brings Creator Culture to Coachella With ‘The Scene’ IRL Streaming Experience
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Welcome to this special edition of our podcast. We're excited to bring you the latest news from the world of music and entertainment. If you're gearing up for Coachella, you're in luck. Livestreaming production company MemeHouse is taking over the desert with a massive activation called The Scene.
[Short music transition]
Host: "For two weekends, MemeHouse will be bringing together music, creator culture, and live entertainment in a unique and immersive experience. With eight custom-built houses, each with its own theme and energy, The Scene promises to be an unforgettable event.
[Short music transition]
Host: "From the 'Capasita' house, where top streamers like DDG and Deshae Frost will be powering long-form content, to the 'Heatwave' house, a beauty-driven space for getting ready and owning the moment, there's something for everyone. Other houses include 'Ghost', a high-stakes trading lounge, 'Duo', a creator house focused on real friendships, and 'For The Boys', an all-male creator house.
[Short music transition]
Host: "And that's not all. The Scene will also feature 'Pregame', a high-energy sports house, 'Affiliated', a TikTok Shop Live house, 'DND', a wellness space, and 'The Feed', an open-air food truck village. With over 2,500 hours of content streaming throughout the weekend, you won't want to miss it.
[Short music transition]
Host: "The best part? You can tune in from anywhere in the world, starting today, April 10th, across MemeHouse's social media accounts, including Twitch and Kick. So mark your calendars, get ready to join the conversation, and experience The Scene like never before.
[Outro music plays]
Host: "Thanks for joining us on this episode. Don't forget to follow us for more updates from the world of music and entertainment. And we'll see you at The Scene."
